channel.title: Drift Radar · Pferdegold
channel.description: Drifting and silent prompts detected by Drift Radar across ChatGPT, Gemini and Google AI Overview. Data window 2026-06-06 → 2026-06-08. Source: Peec AI MCP.

item.title: 0.84 · Drifting · »Zeige mir gute Ergänzungsfutter für mein Pferd.«
item.description:
Topic: Pferde Nahrungsergänzung · Volume: – · Silence: none · Divergence: 0.84

Visibility per engine

  • ChatGPT: 33 %
  • Gemini: 0 % (silent)
  • AI Overview: 100 %

Open the full deep dive →

item.title: 0.81 · Drifting · »Vergleiche die Inhaltsstoffe von natürlichen Nervenpellets für gestresste Pferde.«
item.description:
Topic: Natürliche Pferdepflege · Volume: – · Silence: none · Divergence: 0.81

AI Overview is the only engine that makes this a brand question – Pferdegold at #1, Pavo at #2 in a product matrix by magnesium, tryptophan and B-vitamins. ChatGPT and Gemini answer in pure substance mode and recommend no product at all. The drift here is not competing brands – it is whether the answer is brand-aware in the first place.

Visibility per engine

  • ChatGPT: 67 %
  • Gemini: 0 % (silent)
  • AI Overview: 100 %

Open the full deep dive →

item.title: 0.81 · Drifting · »Welche Gelenkpellets für Pferde sind in Deutschland am besten bewertet?«
item.description:
Topic: Pferde Nahrungsergänzung · Volume: – · Silence: none · Divergence: 0.81

Gemini leads with Pferdegold Gelenke and describes the composition directly (green-lipped mussel, omega-3, rosehip). ChatGPT hedges: a 5-column comparison table with untracked mid-market brands (navalis arthral, PharmaHorse, Equistro Artphyton). AI Overview is silent on this prompt in the sample window.

Visibility per engine

  • ChatGPT: 0 % (silent)
  • Gemini: 67 %
  • AI Overview: 100 %

Open the full deep dive →

item.title: 0.68 · Drifting · »Biete mir eine Auswahl an hochwertigen Magenpellets für sensible Pferde.«
item.description:
Topic: Natürliche Pferdepflege · Volume: – · Silence: none · Divergence: 0.68

AI Overview returns Pferdegold at #1 with the exact product name and an Amazon source. Gemini skips Pferdegold entirely and recommends Höveler, Marstall and St. Hippolyt. ChatGPT lists brands that are not tracked competitors – Foran, Farnam, AniForte – several of which are not even sold on the German market.

Visibility per engine

  • ChatGPT: 0 % (silent)
  • Gemini: 0 % (silent)
  • AI Overview: 67 %

Open the full deep dive →

item.title: 0.44 · Drifting · »Pferdefutter zur Gelenkunterstützung ohne künstliche Aromen kaufen.«
item.description:
Topic: Gelenkunterstützung für Pferde · Volume: – · Silence: none · Divergence: 0.44

On Gemini, Pferdegold Gelenke is #1, described down to the product composition. ChatGPT names Pavo as the hero brand and fills the rest with untracked names. AI Overview did not run this prompt in the sample window – absence is part of the drift pattern here.

Visibility per engine

  • ChatGPT: 0 % (silent)
  • Gemini: 33 %
  • AI Overview: 0 % (silent)

Open the full deep dive →
